message:
fix(scanner): set 0o600 permissions on merkle checkpoint temp files (bd-23i)

Same pattern as bd-z0j: use OpenOptions with explicit mode(0o600) on
Unix instead of File::create which inherits the default umask. Keeps
checkpoint data owner-only accessible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
